results.explanation: Blizzard Brahma 88 strongly matches on: damp. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stable at speed, doesn't wander." Review: "Incredibly damp — smoothest ride under 90mm" Review: "titanal construction gives it dampness that rivals heavier skis"
Salomon QST 106 strongly matches on: damp. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "not as stable as heavier chargers" Review: "damp but lively feel" Review: "flax adds natural dampness"

Salomon Stance 90 strongly matches on: damp. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Stiff and damp from the titanal construction" Review: "Titanal construction makes it damp"

Fischer RC One 82 GT strongly matches on: damp. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing" Review: "incredible stiffness for all-day piste skiing" Review: "Titanal construction gives good dampness and edge grip"

Nordica Enforcer 100 strongly matches on: damp. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "titanal makes it damp"
Blizzard Rustler 10 strongly matches on: damp. Moderate match on: stiffness. Review: "land softly"
Dynastar M-Free 108 strongly matches on: damp. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "Dampness is good"
Moderate match on: stiffness, damp. Review: "dampness is moderate — you'll feel chop more than with titanal skis"

Moderate match on: stiffness, damp. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Edge grip is good but not outstanding. Not as damp as heavier titanal skis."

ground_truth.reason: Mantra M6, dampness 9, stability 9, all-mountain expert
